message:
feat(policy): add emergency escalation to break fallback_safe deadlock under sustained pressure

When fallback_safe mode has been active for >15 minutes AND pressure
remains at RED/Critical, the policy engine is deadlocked: no deletions
can occur (fallback_safe prevents them), so pressure never drops, so
clean-window recovery gates never fire.

Add check_emergency_escalation() that auto-promotes from fallback_safe
to Canary mode after the threshold, allowing capped deletions to break
the feedback loop. Kill-switch fallbacks are exempt (operator-intended).
Track fallback_entered_at timestamp for the escalation timer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
